questions.question: Describe the main advantages of using the chalk and talk method over PowerPoint presentations in a teaching-learning process. (6 marks)
What are the key features of a well-designed PowerPoint presentation, and how do they enhance the learning process? (8 marks)

Explain the difference between a chalk and talk method and a PowerPoint presentation, and choose one that you think is more effective for teaching and learning. Justify your answer with reasons. (10 marks)
